main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.08|1.08]] |gameversion=1.08 |date=December 2, 2024 |summary=Minor balance changes for all characters. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20241202 Patch Notes] }} == '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Jump Cancels''' ** Canceling a character's prejump frames into a special move can no longer be used to escape normal Throws as a defensive option ** Active frames of a normal Throw are extended when they make contact with throw invuln prejump frames, ensuring a jump canceled special will be thrown immediately ** This is especially impactful for Zangief and Lily, who have a longer prejump time that could be canceled into a command throw * '''Sweeps''' ** Several {{clr|H|2HK}} sweeps has their pushback or recovery adjusted to ensure that opponents can consistently punish them on block ** Some perfectly spaced sweeps may still be safe in specific matchups when spaced perfectly ** Applied to Akuma, Cammy, Ken, Jamie, and M. Bison * '''Perfect Parry vs. Multi-hit Attacks''' ** After a Perfect Parry, it is no longer possible to cancel the later hits of an attack ** This was already true on block, but now applies on hit and armor as well ** This change allows characters to punish more attacks with {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}}, such as M. Bison's {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Crusher}} and Lily's {{clr|6|Windclad}} {{clr|OD|OD Condor Spire}} *** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aOqaB9rCgqQ Video example of how the cancel used to work] *** ''Note: this change was temporarily reverted due to a bug, but was re-applied in Version 1.09'' * '''{{clr|OD|Overdrive Specials}}''' ** The visual effects of {{clr|OD|OD}} moves now take priority over Burnout recovery effects when performed immediately after Burnout ends * '''Super Armor''' ** Fixed issue where an attack could be absorbed by armor even when connecting with a non-armored hurtbox, if it connected during the hitstop of another attack that was armor absorbed ** Hypothetical example: Marisa absorbs a projectile with Gladius (upper-body armor), then a {{clr|M|2MK}} connects immediately afterward during the armor hitstop, leading to it being absorbed when it should go under the armor hurtbox * '''Collision Box Behavior''' ** Fixed issue where cornered characters would shift a greater distance when switching sides with an airborne opponent
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 * {{clr|H|HP Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) ** Juggle Increase value when triggering {{clr|OD|Toxic Blossom}} decreased 5 → 2 ** Gives more lenient combo routes when comboing into {{clr|H|236HP}} on a poisoned opponent * {{clr|H|HK Cruel Fate}} ({{clr|H|214HK}}) ** Increased KD Advantage when the final hit connects on an airborne opponent
=== '''Akuma''' === * Back Walk Speed reduced 0.036 → 0.035 * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** Fixed issue where buffering attacks after Adamant Flame would result in simple-input damage scaling * {{clr|M|2MK}} ** Can now cancel to {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} 2f earlier (on the first active frame) * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Pushback on block reduced for both Akuma and the opponent; easier for many characters to punish * {{clr|M|Resso Snap Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) ** Whiff recovery increased 18 → 19 and extended the whiff hurtbox * {{clr|M|Tenmaku Blade Kick}} ({{clr|M|j.2MK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 * Gou Hadoken (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Forward hurtbox extended from the 3rd active frame onward * {{clr|OD|OD Gou Shoryuken}} ({{clr|OD|623PP}}) ** Total damage decreased 1900 → 1700 * {{clr|OD|OD Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) ** KD Advantage increased +46 → +47 * {{clr|L|LK Demon Raid}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) ** Movement speed after crossing over the opponent increased 0.02 → 0.04 ** Now matches the movement speed of the other strengths * Demon Swoop (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~[2]) ** 5f extra landing recovery when crossing over opponent
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 * {{clr|M|Double Knee Bombs}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) ** Foot hurtbox raised upwards on frame 9 onward, making it a more effective low crush ** 1st hit now causes free juggle state vs. airborne, allowing both hits to connect *** Also causes shorter blowback time and distance for both 1st and 2nd hits on airborne opponents ** Fixed issue where Blanka would get pushed back when the 2nd hit connected on a cornered airborne opponent * {{clr|H|Wild Nail}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** KD Advantage increased by 2 frames on grounded hit (+18 → +20) and by 5 frames on airborne hit ** Ensures Blanka is always plus after a Forward Dash; no change to {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} version
=== '''Cammy''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} ** Whiff recovery increased 14 → 17 and extended the whiff hurtbox for entire recovery * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Pushback on block reduced * {{clr|OD|OD Cannon Spike}} ({{clr|OD|623KK}}) ** No longer switches sides on hit ** KD Advantage increased +16 → +19 ** Damage distribution changed 1100,100x4 → 600,100x3,600 ** More rewarding if only the late active frames connect ** Active frames for 1st hit's full animation reduced by 1 (frames 1-4 → 1-3) ** Extends a wider combo-only hitbox on active frames 3-4 * Cannon Strike (j.214K) ** Drive Gain increased 1000 → 2500 * {{clr|OD|OD Cannon Strike}} ({{clr|OD|j.214KK}}) ** When input on the way up, frame advantage is now fixed when the first active frame connects: {{sf6-adv|E|0 on Hit}} / {{sf6-adv|M|-2 on Block}} ** Weakens its use as a corner throw escape; can no longer link to {{clr|M|4MP}} for a corner side switch even on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} * Razor's Edge Slicer (236P/{{clr|OD|236PP}}~No Input) ** Hurtbox extended upward while sliding on the ground ** Previously, Cammy could low profile under Blanka/Chun-Li/Jamie {{clr|OD|OD Reversals}}, Marisa {{clr|OD|OD Scutum Counter}}, Akuma/Luke/Rashid/Ryu {{clr|SA|SA1}}, and Luke {{clr|SA|SA2}} ** Can still low profile Dhalsim {{clr|SA|SA2}} like most crouching attacks
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 * Serenity Stream (Modern Controls) can now use all 6 follow-ups ** Kick followups ({{clr|L|Forward Strike}} / {{clr|M|Senpu Kick}} / {{clr|H|Tenku Kick}}) are performed using {{clr|L|2L}}/{{clr|M|2M}}/{{clr|H|2H}} ** Punch followups ({{clr|L|Orchid Palm}} / {{clr|M|Snake Strike}} / {{clr|H|Lotus Fist}}) are performed using {{clr|L|5L}}/{{clr|M|5M}}/{{clr|H|5H}} * {{clr|M|Snake Strike}} (214P~{{clr|M|MP}}) ** Startup reduced 11 → 7 ** Active frames increased 7 → 11 (total frame count unchanged) ** These new early active frames result in a worse Knockdown / Block / Perfect Parry advantage (up to 4f worse at close range) ** Drive Gain increased 500 → 2000 * {{clr|M|Senpu Kick}} (214P~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Hitstun increased 22 → 24 (now combos into {{clr|H|HK Spinning Bird Kick}}) ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-5(-29)}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}}{{sf6-adv|VM|(-27)}} ** {{clr|DR|DRC}} Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+9}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+11}} (allows link to {{clr|H|2HP}}) * {{clr|H|HK Spinning Bird Kick}} ({{clr|H|[2]8HK}}) ** Startup reduced 21 → 20 (now combos from {{clr|M|2MP}} and {{clr|M|Stance MK}}) ** Total animation time decreased 95 → 94 ** Airborne frames shifted 1f earlier to compensate (19-73 → 18-72)
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|L|Knee Shot}} ({{clr|L|j.2LK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 500 → 2000 * Funky Dance Feint ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|4HP}}) ** Total Recovery decreased 23 → 22 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} ** Dee Jay is now safe from 4-frame normals on hit and 6f reversals on block, making the mixup more effective * {{clr|M|MK Jackknife Maximum}} ({{clr|M|[2]8MK}}) ** Active frames increased '''3(10)'''4 → '''4(9)'''4 (no change to total duration) * {{clr|H|HK Jackknife Maximum}} ({{clr|H|[2]8HK}}) ** Active frames increased '''4(8)'''5(8)4 → '''5(7)'''5(8)4 (no change to total duration) ** Extended the air-only hitbox upward, making it a more consistent anti-air * {{clr|M|Waning Moon}} ({{clr|M|214K~MK}}) ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} causes a longer ground bounce time ** Now guarantees a {{clr|H|236HK}} juggle if 2nd active frame connects (always occurs vs. crouching) * {{clr|OD|OD Waning Moon}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Juggle Start/Increase reduced 14 → 4 ** Much more lenient juggles after ground bounce, including {{clr|OD|OD Jackknife}} and {{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}} Sobat
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|L|5LP}} ** Chain timing into {{clr|L|2LP}} is 1f faster, now frame traps vs. 4-frame normals * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Drive Gain increased 2500 → 4000 * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Drive Gain increased 2500 → 3500 * {{clr|L|Agile Kick}} ({{clr|L|1LK}}) ** Chain timing into {{clr|L|2LP}} is 1f faster, now frame traps vs. 4-frame normals * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Arch}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) ** Can now be slightly farther off-screen without disappearing (midscreen only) * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Fire}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Reduced pushback on 2nd hit ** This change ensures that the following combo is still possible despite the faster {{clr|L|Light}} chain timing: {{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|2LP}} > {{clr|OD|236PP}}, {{clr|SA|LP SA1}} * Aerial Yoga Teleport (j.6PPP/j.6KKK/j.4PPP/j.4KKK) ** Collision box comes out 1 frame faster after reappearing ** Fixes issue where Dhalsim would face the wrong direction when opponent tries to teleport behind a cornered opponent
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} ** Recovery increased 11 → 12 ** Hit Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} (no longer links to itself on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}}) ** Blockstun increased 9 → 10 ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} ** Perfect Parry Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|VM|-11}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}} ** Wider hurtbox now applies to the final recovery frame, making it easier to counterpoke * {{clr|M|5MK}} ** Whiff recovery increased 18 → 20 and extends a wide hurtbox until the final recovery frame ** The attack already had 2f extra whiff recovery, so this brings the total to 4f extra whiff recovery * {{clr|M|2MK}} ** Whiff recovery increased 16 → 17 and extends a wide hurtbox until 15th recovery frame * {{clr|H|Cobra Punch}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 * Psycho Flicker (236K) ** Extends a forward hurtbox on frame 1 until the end of recovery (applies to all meterless versions) ** This hurtbox is projectile invuln until the active frames (makes it easier to counterpoke Ed on startup) * Kill Rush Backward (236[K]~4KK) ** Extends a wide forward hurtbox during recovery ** This leaves Ed vulnerable to counters like {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} if charging Flicker too close to the opponent * {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Blitz}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Blockstun decreased 49 → 48 ** Block Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} ** Reduced pushback on block (4-frame punishes are practically always guaranteed) ** Moves forward more during startup (Range on 1st active frame: 1.581 → 1.671) ** Makes it more consistent when canceled from ranged lights, but also makes it more consistent to punish or interrupt on startup * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}, {{clr|L|LP}} version only) ** Drive Damage now only occurs on the final hit rather than being spread across all hits ** This allows the opponent to recover some Drive gauge during long sequences while Ed is building up his own meter
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Hitstun increased 25 → 27 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+15}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+17}} ** Allows a natural combo into Taiho Cannon Lift (236K~2P), giving Honda a much more consistent and damaging launch starter * Teppo Triple Slaps (236K~P) ** Drive Gain increased 1000x2 → 2000x2 ** Increased pushback on block (ends outside of throw range when spaced well) ** Massively extended the attack hitbox and reduced arm/foot hurtbox * {{clr|OD|OD Teppo Triple Slaps}} ({{clr|OD|236KK~P}}) ** Blockstun (2nd hit) increased 22 → 23 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} ** Reduced pushback on block (always in Oicho range if both hits connect) ** Massively extended the attack hitbox and reduced arm/foot hurtbox * Oicho Throw (63214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Startup reduced 7 → 6 ** Active frames increased 3 → 4 ** Now acts as E. Honda's primary {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} punish * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|[4]646K}}) ** Now projectile invincible for the entire animation on hit ** Can now consistently punish slow projectiles like A.K.I. {{clr|L|214LP}}, or even Rashid {{clr|SA|SA2}} from fullscreen
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|H|Spinning Back Knuckle}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 5000 * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Cross}} ({{clr|OD|214PP~6PP}}) ** Wallsplat lasts 3f longer for more lenient juggle follow-ups (can now juggle {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|H|6HP}})
=== '''Jamie''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Gauge}} is replenished with Drinks even at DL0 ~ DL3 (1 Drive bar = 10000 units of Drive) ** +2500 Drive (50% of DL4 gain): The Devil Inside (22P Drink) ** +2500 Drive (25% of DL4 gain): {{clr|H|Phantom Sway}} ({{clr|H|2HK~HK~P}}) ** +5000 Drive (50% of DL4 gain): Forward Throw + Drink, {{clr|M|Full Moon Kick}} ({{clr|M|DL2 6MK~MK~P}}), Freeflow Kicks (236P~6K~6K), {{clr|SA|SA1 Drink Ender}} ** +10000 Drive (33.3% of DL4 gain): {{clr|SA|SA2 Activation}} * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Removed the extended hurtbox on frames 5-8, making it easier to use as a ranged approach * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Reduced pushback when spaced so that only the 2nd hit is blocked ** Jamie is actually safer when connecting with the 1st hit's maximum range * {{clr|H|j.HK}} ** Now causes juggle state on both hits without {{clr|PC|CH/PC}}, making it a more rewarding air-to-air * {{clr|H|Ransui Haze Headbutt}} (Close {{clr|H|6HK~4HK~P}}, DL4) ** Increased forward movement during startup (Range: 1.649 → 1.935) * {{clr|OD|OD Freeflow Strikes}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** DL4 version juggles the opponent higher on each hit ** This makes a cancel into {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} more consistent * {{clr|M|MK Bakkai}} ({{clr|M|236MK}}, DL2) ** Extended combo-only hitbox upward on 4th hit to prevent it from dropping in juggles * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Extended combo-only hitbox upward on 1st hit to ensure juggles will connect properly * {{clr|SA|CA}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Extended the input buffer at the end of the cinematic
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|M|5MP}} ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 * {{clr|OD|OD Torbalan}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) ** Now only plays out the 1st hit of the projectile attack after colliding with 1-hit {{clr|OD|OD}} projectiles * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Projectiles now remain on screen to combo after a {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Throw (improves his mixup game vs. Parry) ** 2 projectiles will connect if thrown immediately, and 1 will connect if thrown after the first is blocked * {{clr|SA|SA3/CA}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Combo-only hitbox extended upwards (less likely to drop on high juggled opponents)
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 (regular) / 750 → 1000 ({{clr|SA|FSE chained}} version) * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Airborne {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} now causes a spinning {{sf6-jug|free juggle}} state ** Very rewarding as a late-timed anti-air or as a punish on airborne attacks * {{clr|H|Korenzan}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 1500 → 3500 (regular) / 375 → 875 ({{clr|SA|FSE chained}} version) * {{clr|H|HK Fuhajin}} ({{clr|H|214HK}}) ** Active frames increased 4 → 5 ** Recovery reduced 20(22) → 19(21) (no change to total duration) ** Makes Juri's new anti-air {{clr|H|2HP}} juggles more consistent
=== '''Ken''' === * Back Throw ({{clr|L|4LPLK}}) ** Increased distance from the opponent after a corner side switch * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Reduced pushback on block, making it much harder to space safely * {{clr|OD|OD Shoryuken}} ({{clr|OD|623PP}}) ** KD Advantage reduced +29 → +22 (much weaker follow-up pressure) ** Can still safely approach with {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} while blocking reversals, but no guaranteed midscreen oki * {{clr|H|HK Jinrai Kick}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 * {{clr|H|Forward Step Kick}} (KK~{{clr|H|HK}}) ** Starter scaling 20% added (weaker {{clr|PC|Counter-Hit}} conversions) ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 ** Extends a forward hurtbox during recovery, making it easy to punish at closer ranges (still safe if spaced) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** KD Advantage reduced +35 → +9 (no follow-up pressure is possible)
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} ** Blockstun increased 8 → 9 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} ** Gains much better pressure after {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} starter or vs. Burnout * {{clr|L|2LK}} ** Hitstun increased 12 → 14 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} ** Can now link to {{clr|H|2HP}}/{{clr|M|5MK}} from {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} or into {{clr|M|2MP}}/{{clr|M|5MP}} on {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} ** When spaced out, {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|L|2LK}} can be up to {{sf6-adv|VP|+10}}, linking to {{clr|H|5HP}} * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Increased forward movement during startup (Range: 1.26 → 1.41) ** The edge of the hitbox was raised to make low-profile attacks effective against it * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Proximity guard box now matches the attack hitbox (bug fix) * {{clr|M|Water Slicer Slide}} ({{clr|M|3MK}}) ** The first 4 active frames have set recovery; always {{sf6-adv|P|+1 oH}} / {{sf6-adv|VM|-5 oB}} at worst spacing ** These 4 frames also cause a knockdown on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} (KD +37), greatly enhancing its use as a whiff punish * {{clr|H|Hisen Kick}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) ** Foot hitbox extended forward and hurtbox reduced ** Drive Gain increased 1200 → 3000 ** On hit, 1f longer hitconfirm window for {{clr|PC|CH/PC}} combo extensions * {{clr|M|Elbow Drop}} ({{clr|M|j.2MP}}) ** Can now be buffered when input early in the jump arc * {{clr|L|LP Vagabond Edge}} ({{clr|L|236LP}}) ** Blockstun increased 19 → 20 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}}{{sf6-adv|M|(-3)}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}}{{sf6-adv|M|(-2)}} ** Less pushback on hit, and a different knockback animation occurs when connecting with final active frame * {{clr|OD|OD Torso Cleaver}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}~{{clr|L|LK}}) ** Combo-only hitbox expanded upward (more consistent 2-hit juggles) * Arc Step (cl.236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Startup reduced 8f → 6f after Sprint ** All medium normals can now combo into both versions naturally ** {{clr|H|5HP}}/{{clr|M|5MP}} now frame trap into Arc step, and {{clr|M|5MK}}/{{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} frame trap into {{clr|OD|OD Arc Step}} ** The faster startup causes the opponent to be juggled slightly higher when canceled from {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}, allowing for new midscreen juggles: *** {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} > cl.236K, juggle {{clr|SA|SA1}} *** {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} > {{clr|OD|cl.236KK}}, juggle {{clr|SA|SA1}} / {{clr|SA|SA3}} / {{clr|L|236LP}} (cannot cancel into {{clr|SA|SA3}} midscreen) ** Kimberly's {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} state changed from after the 2nd hit → after the 1st hit * Bushin Hojin Kick (cl.236K~K) ** Knockdown time increased by 1f on airborne hit * {{clr|OD|OD Bushin Hojin Kick}} ({{clr|OD|cl.236KK~K}}) ** 1st hit has reduced knockback distance vs. grounded opponents and increased knockback distance vs. airborne opponents ** 2nd hit has increased knockback distance vs. airborne opponents ** Combined with the {{clr|OD|OD Arc Step}} changes, Kimberly no longer gets a KD +42 corner knockdown on {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}} > {{clr|OD|cl.236KK~K}} > Spraycan * {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} ({{clr|SA|j.214214P}}) ** Startup reduced 13f → 2f when canceled from {{clr|OD|OD}} specials ** More consistent in combos, and allows a combo when canceled from midscreen {{clr|OD|OD Bushin Hojin Kick}}
=== '''Lily''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} ** Hitstun increased 16 → 17 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Block Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} (cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame) * {{clr|H|Desert Storm 1}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Hitstun increased 27 → 28 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+17}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+18}} ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 ** Juggle Limit increased 0 → 1 (more juggle routes, particularly after crumples) * {{clr|H|Desert Storm 2}} ({{clr|H|6HP~HP}}) ** Extended hitbox upward and forward ** Juggle Limit increased 1 → 2 * {{clr|H|Desert Storm 3}} ({{clr|H|6HP~HP~HP}}) ** Damage increased 500 → 800 ** Extended the hitbox forward * {{clr|WC|Windclad}} Tomahawk Buster ({{clr|WC|W.}}623P) ** 2nd hit launches the opponent higher when connecting on grounded opponents (standing only) ** This increases the KD Advantage of this late hit; all versions can get follow-up juggles near the corner ** {{clr|L|LP}} version leaves opponent closer to Lily, allowing follow-up juggles even midscreen like {{clr|H|2HK}}, {{clr|SA|SA1/SA2}}, or {{clr|H|2HP}} that can be canceled for an air reset mixup
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Collision box expanded upward to prevent it from whiffing in juggles * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 * {{clr|H|Double Impact}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Increased forward movement (Range: 1.80 → 1.90) and increased the proximity guard hitbox to match the new range ** Reduced pushback on hit * Nose Breaker ({{clr|M|2MK}}~{{clr|H|2HP}}) ** Hitstun increased 29 → 30 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} ** Can now force a true strike/throw mixup against reversal 4-frame normals * {{clr|OD|OD Sand Blast}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Upper body hurtbox expands 5 frames later (14f → 19f), making it better in projectile wars * {{clr|OD|Fatal Shot}} ({{clr|OD|236PP~PP}}) ** Now causes a short wallsplat on hit ** Juggle Increase value decreased 2 → 0 *** Juggle follow-ups are possible near the corner; from midscreen, can whiff 236K~P to become {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} at close range ** Increased hitstop when the base of the attack connects ** Increased the buffer window at the end of recovery * {{clr|L|Charged/Perfect LP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|L|214[LP]}}) ** 2nd hit expands the hitbox upward when the 1st hit connects to ensure juggle consistency * {{clr|M|MP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}) ** Blockstun increased 20 → 22 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-8}} ** Reduced hurtbox during recovery ** Reduced pushback on hit (still outside throw range, but can throw with a very short microwalk) *** Because it is now {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} against Burnout, characters may struggle to punish at certain spacings, creating a new pressure loop ** Increased the buffer window at the end of recovery * {{clr|M|Perfect MP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|M|pf.214[MP]}}) ** 2nd hit no longer adds an extra hit of damage scaling * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Travels much farther forward on cinematic hit (improved corner carry) ** Reduced horizontal knockback on airborne opponents for more consistent juggles into the full animation
=== '''M. Bison''' === * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Blockstun decreased 18 → 17 ** Block Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|VM|-11}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}} * {{clr|L|j.LK}} ** Cross-up hitbox extended backwards to match {{clr|M|j.MK}} * {{clr|H|Evil Knee}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Drive Damage on Block decreased 5000 → 3000 * {{clr|OD|OD Double Knee Press}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) ** Now counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into * {{clr|M|MP Psycho Crusher}} ({{clr|M|[4]6MP}}) ** Drive Gain increased 2500 → 3500 (regular) / 4500 → 5500 (Mine Detonation) * {{clr|H|HP Psycho Crusher}} ({{clr|H|[4]6HP}}) ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 5000 (regular) / 5000 → 7000 (Mine Detonation) * {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Crusher}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}) ** Damage on Mine Detonation decreased 2000 → 1600 (no change to Chip damage) ** Drive Damage on Block decreased 10000 → 5000 (regular) / 13000 → 8000 (Mine Detonation) * Shadow Rise ([2]8K) ** New hurtbox around M. Bison's feet added to meterless versions (invincible to projectiles) * Devil Reverse ([2]8K~P) ** Downward hitbox reduced ** Arm hurtbox is expanded forward on frame 9~ and forward/downward during active frames * Devil Reverse + Psycho Mine ([2]8K~P + Mine) ** Blockstun increased 76 → 80 (total) ** Landing recovery reduced 10 → 8 *** These combined changes improve the Block Advantage by 6f and the KD Advantage by 2f ** Fixed bug where Psycho Mine would not detonate at the lowest height
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Hit Recovery reduced 26 → 23 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} ** No change to {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} advantage * {{clr|M|À Terre}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** 2nd hit Drive Gain increased 1000 → 2500 * {{clr|H|HK Dégagé}} ({{clr|H|214HK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 * Manège Doré (63214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Higher Medal Levels now build more {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge ** Level 3/4: 3000 → 4000 ** Level 5: 3000 → 5000 * Renversé (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Higher Medal Levels now build more {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge (only for full animation; no change when canceled into {{clr|SA|SA3}}) ** Level 3/4: 2150 → 3150 ** Level 5: 2150 → 4150 * Grand Fouetté (236P~K) ** Launches opponents closer to Manon for juggle consistency * Renversé Feint (236[P]/{{clr|OD|[PP]}}) ** Recovery reduced by 2f for all versions ** {{clr|L|LP}}: 33 → 31 ** {{clr|M|MP}}: 34 → 32 ** {{clr|H|HP}}: 35 → 33 ** {{clr|OD|OD}}: 34 → 32
=== '''Marisa''' === * Prejump Frames ** Head hurtbox increased to match the normal standing height * {{clr|H|Charged 5[HP]}} / {{clr|H|5[HK]}} / {{clr|H|2[HK]}} / {{clr|H|3[HP]}} ** Startup reduced by 3f ** Total animation time is 3f shorter as a result * {{clr|H|5HP/5[HP]}} ** Hitbox extended forward ** 1st active frame extended downward to match 2nd active frame ** Charged version juggles the opponent closer vs. airborne opponents * {{clr|H|2HP/2[HP]}} ** Increased launch height on grounded {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} ** Can now buffer follow-up inputs 9f before end of recovery ** {{clr|H|Charged 2[HP]}} only: *** Extended the forward hitbox on 2nd active frame *** Throwable hurtbox does not extend before the active frames, making it much better as a shimmy tool just outside of throw range * {{clr|H|2HK/2[HK]}} ** Extended the combo-only hitbox upward to make it easier to juggle into ** Extended the proximity guard hitbox on both versions to the full attack range of {{clr|H|2[HK]}} (makes it harder to walk back out of range) * {{clr|H|Charged Falx Crusher}} ({{clr|H|6[HK]}}) ** Increased forward movement during startup (Range: 2.122 → 2.212) ** Pushback on block decreased ** Much better follow-up pressure; leaves Marisa in throw range unless used near max distance * {{clr|H|Heavy Two Hitter}} ({{clr|H|5HP~HP}}) ** Juggle Limit increased 1 → 2 * {{clr|H|Malleus Breaker}} ({{clr|H|3HP~3HP}}) ** 2nd hit now knocks down even on grounded opponents (KD +29) ** Knockdown time extended by 10 frames (compared to the previous juggle knockdown) * Charged Gladius (236[P]) ** Extended the follow-up hitbox upward when hitting mid-air opponents ** Less likely to drop the cinematic hit as an anti-air or in juggles * Phalanx (623P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Active frames increased 3 → 6 ** Recovery reduced 18 → 15 to compensate; as a result, all recovery frames are now considered grounded ** Extended hitbox forward ** Drive Gain increased 2000 → 3000 on meterless versions ** Airborne time is extended by 1 frame for all versions * Scutum (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Armored counter hitbox extended downward to catch more low-angled attacks
=== '''Rashid''' === * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Drive Gain increased 3000 → 4000 * Backup (6[6]~6P) ** Starter scaling 20% added * Side Flip (6KK) ** Collision box disappears 2 frames later (6f → 8f) ** Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent ** Can no longer avoid immediate {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} after canceling a normal into {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|OD|OD Spinning Mixer}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** KD Advantage reduced +25 → +9 and shorter knockback distance when final hit connects *** This severely weakens oki, corner carry, and {{clr|SA|SA2}} setup potential ** 5f extra knockdown advantage if the final hit does not connect ** Wind Enhanced version: KD Advantage decreased +47 → +42 (not mentioned in patch notes) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Cinematic version KD Advantage reduced +11 → +1
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|M|2MK}} ** Cancel window for special moves and {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} shifted 2f earlier ** Can now always cancel an armor-absorbed {{clr|M|2MK}} for a {{clr|DR|counter-DI}} ** {{clr|M|2MK}} > {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} Hadoken is no longer punishable by {{clr|DR|DI}}, and {{clr|M|2MK}} > {{clr|H|HP Hadoken}} is always a true blockstring * {{clr|H|Axe Kick}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 1500 (750x2) → 3500 (1500,2000) * {{clr|H|Whirlwind Kick}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) ** Can now be canceled into meterless Air Tatsu ** This version is {{sf6-adv|VM|-16 on Block}}, and all landing recovery is in a standing state ** Juggle Limit increased 0 → 1 *** Can now be used in juggles like {{clr|OD|OD High Blade Kick}}, {{clr|H|6HK}} > Air Tatsu or {{clr|PC|PC}} {{clr|DR|DI}}, {{clr|H|nj.HP}}, {{clr|H|6HK}} > Air Tatsu * {{clr|H|HK High Blade Kick}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) ** Startup reduced 29 → 27 ** Recovery reduced 16 → 15 ** Blockstun increased 20 → 21 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Drive Damage on Block increased 8000 → 10000 ** Knockdown time increased by 1f to remain KD +45, and the recovery change allows a juggle into {{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|OD|OD}} Shoryuken in the corner * {{clr|OD|Denjin OD Hadoken}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Juggle Increase value decreased 1,1,2 → 1,1,1 (more lenient juggle follow-ups) * {{clr|OD|OD Hashogeki}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Damage increased 900 → 1100
=== '''Terry''' === * {{clr|L|Assist Combo 1}} ** Fixed issue where the 3rd hit would not be performed if the 2nd hit was absorbed by armor * {{clr|M|2MP}} ** Reduced pushback on hit * {{clr|H|5HP}} ** Block Recovery decreased 18 → 16 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} (no change to {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} data) ** When the {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} version is blocked, Terry can microwalk + throw to beat 4f normals ** Increased input buffer on hit by 2f to make follow-ups easier * {{clr|H|2HK}} ** Hitbox connects lower on grounded opponents, preventing upper-body armor from absorbing it * {{clr|M|MP Power Wave}} ({{clr|M|236MP}}) ** Hurtbox expansion starts 2f later (16f → 18f), making it harder to counterpoke in neutral * {{clr|H|HP Round Wave}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) ** Recovery reduced 16 → 14 ** Total animation reduced 53 → 51 ** Hitstun decreased 33 → 31 ** Blockstun decreased 30 → 28 ** Perfect Parry Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VM|-23}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-21}} (Hit/Block Advantage unchanged) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 5000 → 7000 ** These changes give Terry an extra 2 frames for follow-up juggles on airborne opponents, and the blockstring gap is no longer punishable by {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} when canceled from {{clr|H|5HP}}/{{clr|H|2HP}} or {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|M|5MP}}/{{clr|M|2MP}}/{{clr|M|2MK}} * {{clr|L|LK Power Charge}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) ** Reduced forward hitbox of 1st active frame ** Allows meaty mid-combo hit despite {{clr|M|2MP}} pushback reduction * {{clr|L|LK Crack Shoot}} ({{clr|L|214LK}}) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 2000 → 2500 * {{clr|M|MK Crack Shoot}} ({{clr|M|214MK}}) ** Hitstun increased 21 → 23 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} ** Grounded {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} changed to a Hard Knockdown (HKD +28, identical to {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}}) ** Fixed issue where hitstun was longer than intended when the 5th active frame connected on a grounded opponent ** Drive Damage on Block increased 2500 → 3500 * {{clr|H|HK Crack Shoot}} ({{clr|H|214HK}}) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 2000x2 → 2000,3000 ** Drive Gain (final hit) increased 2000 → 3000 vs. grounded opponents * {{clr|OD|OD Crack Shoot}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) ** Keeps the opponent closer to Terry during the ground bounce * {{clr|OD|OD Burning Knuckle}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 6000 → 8000 ** Juggles airborne opponents closer to Terry (follow-ups like {{clr|SA|SA2}} cancel are more consistent) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Expanded combo-only hitbox for consistency in juggles ** Juggles opponents closer to Terry, and expanded the Twin Geyser follow-up hitbox to ensure it connects ** Alternate version (21416MK+HP) inputs made stricter; previously could be performed without the initial 214 input
=== '''Zangief''' === * Russian Drop ({{clr|L|1LPLK}}) / Brainbuster ({{clr|L|2LPLK}}) / German Suplex ({{clr|L|6LPLK}}) ** {{clr|SA|Super Gain}} on Hit increased 2000 → 3000 / on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} increased 4000 → 6000 * Power Stomps ({{clr|M|22MK~MK~MK}}) ** Drive Gain increased 1000x3 → 1500x3 ** Can now be used with Modern controls using the input {{clr|M|22M}}~{{clr|M|M}}~{{clr|M|M}} * Siberian Express (63214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Fixed issue that caused the different mid/far versions to come out when activated at the same range
